budgetSettings.title: Budget & Pricing Settings
budgetSettings.subtitle: Set default overhead and profit margin percentages by class. These apply when no per-item override is set.
budgetSettings.formula: Formula: Sell Price = Cost x (1 + Overhead%) x (1 + Profit Margin%). Per-item overrides on the Item Catalog take precedence.
